author: sricursion
name: RunPod reproduction evidence: SP8192 QK-Gain 5.25 seed 42
technique_summary: Single-seed RunPod reproduction of the public SP8192 + 3-layer recurrence + parallel residual + QK-gain 5.25 + legal TTT record script.
notes: The original run completed training and failed during packaging due to missing brotli. A recovery pass installed brotli, packaged an under-16MB artifact, and completed quantized chunked eval, then failed before sliding-window and TTT eval due to a temporary recovery-wrapper TorchDynamo import issue.
